verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Along life’s road I stumbled in the darkness My blinded eyes had caused my feet to roam, I met the Lord who spoke to me so sweetly, Come walk with me and now you will see home”.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: “Come walk with me The way Is strait and narrow Come walk with me, You cannot walk alone; For the road Is rough And there are many dangers Come walk with me And I will see you home”.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So now I walk with Christ My blessed Saviour I need not fear for I am not alone He guides me through this life With all it's sorrows, And some day soon He’ll see me safely home.
